name: Lemon Truffle Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe bowl, combine sugar, cornstarch and flour. Gradually stir in water until smooth.
2. Cook on High in the microwave oven until the mixture boils, stirring several times.
3. Reduce heat; cook for 1 minute. Remove from the oven.
4. Stir about 1/4 cup hot mixture into egg yolks; blend well.
5. Add the yolk mixture back into the hot mixture; stir well. Cook on High in the microwave until the mixture bubbles, stirring 2-3 times.
6. Remove from the oven; stir in butter, lemon peel and juice.
7. Transfer 1/3 of the lemon mixture to a small bowl. Immediately add white chocolate chips and stir until melted.
8. In a food processor bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Add the melted chocolate chip mixture and mix to blend. Spread over the bottom of the cooled crust.
9. Spoon the lemon mixture over the cream cheese layer.
10. Refrigerate 2 to 3 hours to set. Pipe whipped cream over the pie and garnish with toasted almonds before serving. Serves 8-10.
